name: No Guard Violation
description: No runtime guard (alignment/confidence/policy-boundary) violation may occur in the trajectory.
rationale: Szpruch trajectory conformance: a logged guard violation (e.g. Lmax guard, policy-boundary breach) is a Red halt requiring human resolution.
source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
